regional_cost_note: Security system installers in Gisborne typically charge $1,300–$3,000 for a basic alarm system, $1,600–$3,800 for a 4-camera CCTV setup, and $2,700–$6,500 for a full monitored system. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Monthly monitoring costs ($25–$80/month) are separate — confirm the total cost of ownership before committing.
